worker_tasks.task_scope: Identify temporal or network segment boundaries that correlate with shifts in structural regimes using evidence e8 and e9.
stop_conditions: detected stable temporal or segment boundaries
no new regime shifts found in evidence

worker_tasks.task_scope: Compare class-conditioned structural variation patterns across identified regimes using evidence e10 and e23.
stop_conditions: class-conditioned patterns characterized for all regimes

worker_tasks.task_scope: Assess model sensitivity to regime heterogeneity focusing on feature dependencies and shortcut-like signals using evidence e24.
Evaluate potential for regime-aware modeling or detection strategies by verifying local consistency and cardinality of heterogeneous regime features using evidence e8 and e23.
stop_conditions: no inconsistencies in feature cardinality found
